markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to align on goals, target audiences, and content strategy for Rapyd's engagement with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Rapyd aims to improve SEO performance, lead generation, and establish thought leadership in AI-driven marketing](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Focus on high-opportunity industries (iGaming, online gaming, trading platforms, crypto) and partner channels (referral partners, ISOs, payfacs)](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [Content strategy to balance AI-generated and human-led content, with emphasis on deeper, value-driven pieces](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Technical challenges with CMS access need to be addressed for efficient content production and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)

## Topics

### Goals and Objectives

  - [Improve SEO visibility and lead generation for targeted industries](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)
  - [Establish Rapyd as an industry leader in leveraging AI for marketing](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [Increase site traffic and conversions from organic search](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
  - [Enhance overall website quality score and strengthen lead/sales generation](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)

### Target Audiences

  - [High-opportunity industries: iGaming, online gaming, up-and-coming trading platforms, crypto exchanges](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=2337.0)
  - [Partner channels: Referral partners, ISOs (Independent Sales Organizations), payfacs (Payment Facilitators)](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=2974.0)
  - [Focus on attracting partners as gateways to high-value clients in niche industries](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=3191.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Blend AI-generated content for long-tail topics with human-led content for deeper analysis](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
  - [Implement pillar-cluster approach for content organization](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Aim for 50,000 words of aligned, high-quality content monthly](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=2035.0)
  - [Balance content to appeal to both direct clients and potential partners (80-20 or 85-15 split)](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [CMS access requires special setup due to high security measures](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
  - [Interim solution: GrowthX to provide HTML markup for Rapyd team to publish](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=1914.0)
  - [Explore potential API integration for streamlined content uploading](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=1897.0)

### Metrics and Reporting

  - [Current attribution model focuses on first-touch](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)
  - [Need to establish more specific, measurable goals for the engagement](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [GrowthX to access Google Analytics and Search Console for performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to review shared competitor analysis, keyword strategy, and ICP/persona documents](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=2807.0)
  - [Schedule session to discuss CMS access and potential workarounds](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=3575.0)
  - [Set up weekly sync meetings (aiming for Wednesdays/Thursdays)](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=3667.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop initial content opportunities based on research for next session](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=3675.0)
  - [Begin article calibration phase to refine voice, tone, and structure](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=3735.0)
  - [Aim for full content production (10-15 articles/week) by week 4](https://fathom.video/share/-b_wfHWCNBJc9Ka7v3K2vKqyTm2p7sZx?tab=summary&timestamp=3756.0)
